rulings.Case Title: DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING VS. GRISEZ BUCHANAN, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or, In The Alternative Summary Adjudication / (Re-Notice)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2019 line 1 DEFENDANT GRISEZ BUCHANAN, LLC, JEROLD GRISEZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or, In The Alternative Summary Adjudication / (Re-Notice) is continued to December 4, 2019 per agreement of the parties and based on Court's availability. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JACLYN MCGLYNN VS. 634 POWELL I5, LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendant Yat-Pang Au And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2019 line 2 PLAINTIFF JACLYN MCGLYNN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Defendant Yat-Pang Au And For Sanctions is GRANTED. Request for Sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $5,400 against Mr. Au only. =(501/CFH)

CROSS COMPLAINANT MARIA NGUYEN Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Award Of Sanctions is transferred to department 301 to be heard on November 14, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS VS. SAEED KHAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting A Status Conference For The Purpose Of Appointing A Mediator
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT SAEED KHAN Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting A Status Conference For The Purpose Of Appointing A Mediator Kevin Murphy is appointed a mediator per request of the parties jointly seeking an appointment to be made by the Court. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DEFU LU ET AL VS. RIU JUN LU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Tax Plaintiffs Memorandum Of Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT RIU LU, FENG LE, PENG WANG Notice Of Motion To Tax Plaintiffs Memorandum Of Costs is continued to November 14, 2019 for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of reply no later than November 5, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: YING YI WU VS. JOSE LUIS AGUINIGA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 5, 2019 line 9. DEFENDANT CRISTINA TULE-GONZALEZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER Hearing Required.
